codeActions.title: Add @id attribute
codeActions.description: Add @id attribute to mark this field as the primary key

codeActions.title: Make field optional
codeActions.description: Add ? modifier to make this field nullable

codeActions.title: Add @default(now())
codeActions.description: Add @default(now()) for automatic timestamp on creation

codeActions.title: Add createdAt/updatedAt fields
codeActions.description: Add timestamp tracking fields to this model

codeActions.title: Add @@index
codeActions.description: Add a database index for this field to improve query performance

codeActions.title: Extract to enum
codeActions.description: Extract string field values into an enum type

codeActions.title: Add @map for snake_case
codeActions.description: Add @map attribute to map camelCase field to snake_case column

codeActions.title: Add @@map for table name
codeActions.description: Add @@map to map PascalCase model name to snake_case table name

codeActions.title: Format schema
codeActions.description: Format the Prisma schema file (equivalent to prisma format)

codeActions.title: Add relation fields
codeActions.description: Add relation field and foreign key for connecting to another model
